basics.name: Douglas Maitelli
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: I like challenges, anything that requires deep analysis and provide me with an opportunity to design an elegant solution. Always looking to deliver something aiming for the long-term that can be easily maintained and extended. I try to always use the opportunities I have to improve my skills and learn new technologies.

work.name: SAP Concur
work.summary: Develop integration services for Concur Expense processing and financial systems
highlights: Designed the new framework used for integrations with third-party financial systems
Delivered multiple integrations with financial systems such as Xero, Quickbooks and Sage Intacct

work.name: SAP SE
work.summary: Customer requirements gathering / study, project execution, development
highlights: Traveled to customer sites over Europe to gather requirements and design solution proposals
Coordinate development teams across different locations to deliver proposed solutions

work.name: Flimbo
work.summary: Development of the online vectorial art editor, CI / CD pipeline and infrastructure (AWS)
highlights: First Prize at UFRGS Entrepreneurship Marathon

work.name: SAP Labs Latin America
work.summary: Customer requirements gathering / study, project execution, development
highlights: Designed and developed solutions for customers of SAP products
Co-creator of the SAP SmartOffice project
Tech lead of the SAP Arrival Guide App

work.name: Versul Tecnologia de Acesso Inteligente
work.summary: Team management, responsible for application server and core web solution development

projects.name: App Feevale
projects.description: Created the mobile App for the University which later was sold to them and still in use to this day.

projects.name: Flimbo
projects.description: Flimbo was originally a platform for vectorial marketing design and social media integration. It won first place in a startup expo in Brazil and received funding to be developed further.
